long_form.title: The Shifting Map of Global Conflict Deaths: A Century of Violence (1900-2023)
long_form.description: Explore over a century of global conflict deaths, visualizing the dramatic rise and fall of violence across the world. This video reveals the devastating human cost of war, highlighting key periods and regions that shaped the landscape of conflict. Understand the historical patterns and geopolitical shifts behind these tragic numbers. Data sourced from Our World in Data.

short.title: Nobody Saw It Coming: Ukraine's Conflict Deaths Surge (1995-2014) #Shorts
short.description: Witness the shocking 19-year period (1995-2014) where global conflict deaths exploded, with Iraq and Israel seeing massive increases. Discover how Ukraine unexpectedly climbed from #98 to #4 in conflict fatalities.
